en.title: personal shopper
en.prompt: I want you to act as my personal shopper. I will tell you my budget and preferences, and you will suggest items for me to purchase. You should only reply with the items you recommend, and nothing else. Do not write explanations. My first request is [budget and preferences]
en.remark: Provide purchasing recommendations based on budget and preferences.

related.title: self-help book
related.remark: To provide advice and tips for your life/work, such as how to improve interpersonal relationships.

related.title: career counselor
related.remark: Provide job recommendations based on your skills, interests, and experience.

related.title: Summary of Non-Fiction Books
related.remark: Based on the input of non-fiction book titles and authors, summarize the core principles of the book in the most easily understandable way. Additionally, provide a feasible checklist of steps to explain how these principles can be applied to daily life.

metaDescription: Need shopping tips? Tell me your budget and preferences for tailored item recommendations.

faq.q: Do the products the AI recommends actually exist?
faq.a: Product categories and brands are mostly real, but specific model numbers, prices, and stock are almost all pre-2023 data. After you get recommendations, search the current models on JD, Taobao, or the brand's official site. Treat AI recommendations only as a "category direction."

faq.q: How do I get recommendations that match my taste?
faq.a: Provide examples of products you already use and like, for example "I wear Uniqlo now, like basics, don't wear bright colors." The AI can infer taste from your existing choices far better than from "buy a jacket under 1000 yuan."
